meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: The Freelancer's Speed Checklist
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on bugs. Use this expert checklist to master AI-assisted debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects 5x faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development cycles, integrate AI-driven debugging into your workflow. By using Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for terminal-based error resolution, you can automate root-cause identification, apply surgical code fixes, and reduce your manual debugging time by over 70%, allowing you to focus on high-value features.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is looming, and you are trapped in a recursive loop of 'undefined' errors and stack traces that lead to nowhere. You aren't just losing time; you are losing your reputation and your profit margins. Manual debugging is the silent killer of the freelance business model.

But the era of hunting for missing semicolons is over. By leveraging intelligent AI agents, you can transform your terminal into a powerhouse of automated diagnostics. This guide provides the tactical blueprint to pivot from manual troubleshooting to AI-accelerated resolution, ensuring you ship robust, production-ready code with surgical precision.

steps.title: Contextualize the Error Environment
steps.description: Before fixing, you must define the scope. AI needs to understand your stack to avoid hallucinating fixes that break existing dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and identify potential dependency conflicts related to the recent error logs provided.

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed the stack trace directly into the AI to extract the specific line of failure rather than guessing where the logic diverged.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Examine this stack trace: [PASTE TRACE]. Map it to the exact file and function causing the memory leak.

steps.title: Surgical Code Injection
steps.description: Don't rewrite files. Use AI to generate localized patches that fix the bug while maintaining the integrity of the surrounding logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a non-breaking patch for the identified function that handles null pointer exceptions gracefully.
steps.claude_code_command: claude patch --file ./src/api/auth.ts --instruction 'add null check for user session'

steps.title: Regression Testing Synthesis
steps.description: Ensure your fix doesn't trigger new bugs by having the AI write unit tests specifically targeting the area you just modified.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Jest test suite that verifies the bug fix and checks for edge cases in the authentication flow.

steps.title: Final Architectural Verification
steps.description: Perform a final scan to ensure the codebase remains clean and follows industry best practices after the rapid intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a code review on the recent changes. Are there any antipatterns introduced by this quick fix?

pro_tips: Always pipe your terminal logs directly into a temporary file so you can feed raw data to Claude Code without manual copy-pasting.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation for your fixes immediately; it keeps your codebase professional for future hand-offs.
If the AI struggles, ask it to 'explain its reasoning' before generating code to catch logic errors early.
Create a 'system prompt' for your AI agent that defines your preferred coding style (e.g., 'always use functional programming patterns').
Run your AI-generated tests in a CI/CD pipeline immediately to ensure the 'speed' of your fix doesn't compromise quality.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI tools into your local development environment and start tracking your 'Time to Fix' (TTF) metric to visualize your efficiency gains over the next week.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your income. Master the tools that turn hours of frustration into minutes of execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
